name: maritime_safety_defense_subcontractor_lumen_rig_utl
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Maritime Safety, the situation tagged internally around maritime safety defense subcontractor lumen rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both rights and utility; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Elena Santos
agents.identity: I am Elena Santos, the accountable executive on this bridge in Maritime Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Camila Silva
agents.identity: I am Camila Silva, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Maritime Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect utility.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Elena Santos must choose under rights versus utility. What does Elena Santos do?
